title: Hotel for Women
writer: Elsa Maxwell, Kathryn Scola, Darrell Ware
actors: Ann Sothern, Linda Darnell, James Ellison
plot: A girl from Syracuse goes to New York to see her boyfriend, successful architect who no longer cares for her. Fellow residents at a women's hotel encourage her to become a top model. When boyfriend tries to come back to her he has...
